changes: Live sync between browsers — layout, floorplan, and device-config changes now push instantly to every connected screen via server-sent events.
Local edits in progress (edit-mode / dirty stores) are never overwritten by a remote save.
Redesigned the first-launch setup screen for touchscreens — two-column layout on landscape, larger inputs, bigger tap targets.
Removed .env / .env.template — all configuration now lives in the first-launch setup screen.
Setup screen gained optional Toolbar PIN and WiFi QR (SSID / password / security / hidden) fields — Master-only; Slaves inherit both from the Master.
Server no longer reads any environment variables; HA credentials, WiFi, PIN and allowed LAN prefixes are persisted in config/device.json.
Added version watermark on the main screen — tap it to view the full changelog.
Introduced changelog.json as the single source of truth for release history baked into each Docker image.
Initial HAIVE release — 3D Home Assistant interface for Raspberry Pi touchscreens.
